description: User clicks on the origin input field, which currently contains 'London, England', to focus it.
frame_description: The user is on the Rome2Rio search results page for London to Ireland, with the origin field highlighted.

description: User clicks the swap button (double arrows) to switch the origin and destination locations.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned directly over the swap icon between the two location input fields.

description: The origin and destination locations swap in the UI: 'Ireland' moves to the origin field and 'London, England' moves to the destination field.
frame_description: The text in the input fields has swapped, reflecting the user's click on the swap button.

description: User clicks on the destination input field (now containing 'London, England') to prepare for a new search entry.
frame_description: The cursor focuses the destination field, which is now ready for text input.

description: User types 'scotland' into the destination field, deleting the previous entry 'London, England' in the process.
frame_description: The user types characters into the input field, and the text updates from 'London, England' to 'scotland'.

description: An autocomplete dropdown menu appears below the destination field, showing suggested locations starting with 'sc'.
frame_description: A list of suggestions including 'Scandinavia' and 'Scottsdale' appears as the user types.

description: User selects 'Scotland' from the autocomplete suggestion list.
frame_description: The cursor moves down the dropdown list and clicks on the 'Scotland' option.

description: The autocomplete dropdown closes and the destination field is populated with the selected value 'Scotland'.
frame_description: The dropdown menu disappears and the input field now clearly displays 'Scotland'.

description: User clicks the pink search button to initiate the new search from Ireland to Scotland.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the magnifying glass icon on the right and clicks it.

description: The page navigates to the new search results for Ireland to Scotland.
frame_description: The browser URL changes and the page content refreshes to show the new route.

description: The travel options list and the map update to show routes and travel times from Ireland to Scotland.
frame_description: New travel options like 'Train to George Best Belfast City airport...' appear on the left, and the map shows the route between Ireland and Scotland.
